semantic.role: Configuration specification for code symbol extraction rules used by the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Define import patterns for matching #include directives.
Define export patterns for extracting functions, classes, structs, namespaces, and template classes from C++ source code.
Define usage patterns for detecting function calls, scoped member accesses, and method calls.
outOfScope: Runtime behavior analysis or execution semantics.
Build system configuration or dependency management.
Support for programming languages other than C++.

English.purpose: This document specifies the extraction rules for the ArchSpine mirror system, detailing how to import, export, and identify usages of C++ code symbols.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers working on the ArchSpine mirror system, who need to configure code analysis for API documentation or code mapping.
key_takeaways: Rules are defined for functions, classes, structs, namespaces, and template classes.
Usage patterns cover function calls, scoped member access, and method calls.
The import pattern matches #include directives to bring in header files.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了ArchSpine镜像系统的提取规则，详细说明了如何导入、导出和识别C++代码符号的使用。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于ArchSpine镜像系统的开发者，他们需要配置代码分析以生成API文档或代码映射。
key_takeaways: 定义了函数、类、结构体、命名空间和模板类的规则。
使用模式涵盖了函数调用、作用域成员访问和方法调用。
导入模式匹配#include指令以引入头文件。
